name: Henry Winkler's Mexican Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 heads Romaine lettuce, broken into 1/2-inch pieces
6 1/2 oz Tortilla chips, crumbled (1 to 2 bags)
recipeInstructions:
1. Early in the day: Combine mayonnaise, salsa, catsup, and chili powder. Chill.
2. When ready to serve: Place romaine in a large serving bowl; add olives, tomatoes, onion, cheese, and chilies.
3. Top with crumbled chips and avocados.
4. Spread dressing on top; serve. 4 to 6 servings
5. Preparation Time: 25 minutes.
